name: Queen Traditional Wooden Headboard Aged Oak - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add warmth and timeless style to your bedroom decor with this Queen Traditional Wooden Headboard from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Designed in a rectangular silhouette, this traditional headboard in an aged oak-brown finish showcases a rich woodgrain panel with rounded edges atop sleek bed frame-mounted legs that come with perforations for height adjustability. The classic headboard blends easily with any decor and adds depth and dimension to your bed.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
